name: Martian Dollar
statement: One day Vasya got hold of information on the Martian dollar course in bourles for the next n days. The buying prices and the selling prices for one dollar on day i are the same and are equal to ai. Vasya has b bourles. He can buy a certain number of dollars and then sell it no more than once in n days. According to Martian laws, one can buy only an integer number of dollars. Which maximal sum of money in bourles can Vasya get by the end of day n?
